title: vendor: don't remove containers/image/registries.conf
body:
Instruct vndr to not remove image/registries.conf to ease packaging on
Ubuntu.

Fixes: #618
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan @mtrmac can we get this merged please?
Just updated. Once CI is green, we can merge. It doesn't hurt us and we're already whitelisting the manpages.
Actually, merged #616 first, and the tests on this one haven’t started yet; can you rebase, please?
@rhatdan @mtrmac I don't understand why Travis does not kick off in Skopeo. I suspect some (project) config issue as the jobs start much sooner for other projects.
